mapper.insert: insert into service_order(order_no, owner_id, owner_name, phone, category, subtype, description, images_json, address, status, reply, handler_id, handler_name, handle_record, created_at, updated_at) values(#{orderNo}, #{ownerId}, #{ownerName}, #{phone}, #{category}, #{subtype}, #{description}, #{imagesJson}, #{address}, #{status}, #{reply}, #{handlerId}, #{handlerName}, #{handleRecord}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update service_order set status = #{status}, reply = #{reply}, handle_record = #{handleRecord}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from service_order where status = #{status}
select count(*) from service_order where owner_id = #{ownerId} and status = #{status}
